entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The primary cereal crop being studied for drought tolerance

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: An abiotic stress that reduces crop yields worldwide

entities.name: POST-FLOWERING DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to maintain growth and yield under drought stress after the flowering stage

entities.name: SORGHUM REFERENCE SET
entities.description: A curated collection of 384 accessions used as a genetic representative of sorghum

entities.name: GENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of determining the genetic makeup of the sorghum accessions

entities.name: SSR LOCI
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeat markers used to provide genotyping information

entities.name: MORPHO-AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: Physical and agricultural characteristics used to classify sorghum accessions

entities.name: FLOWERING
entities.description: The timing and characteristics of the flowering process in sorghum

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical measurement of the sorghum plant

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country where ICRISAT and NARS locations are situated for evaluation

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: A country where ICRISAT locations are situated for evaluation

entities.name: KENYA
entities.description: A country where ICRISAT locations are situated for evaluation

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: The continent where NARS and ICRISAT locations are situated for evaluation

entities.name: SEED MICRONUTRIENTS
entities.description: The concentration of essential minerals like Zn and Fe in sorghum seeds

entities.name: ZINC
entities.description: A specific seed micronutrient evaluated in sorghum

entities.name: IRON
entities.description: A specific seed micronutrient evaluated in sorghum

entities.name: WATER REGIMES
entities.description: Varying levels of water availability, including stressed and unstressed conditions

entities.name: STAYGREEN QTL
entities.description: Quantitative Trait Loci associated with the stay-green trait for drought tolerance

entities.name: WATER UPTAKE
entities.description: The capacity of the plant to absorb water under stressed conditions

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of grain produced per unit area

entities.name: STOVER YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of vegetative biomass produced per unit area

entities.name: COMPONENT TRAITS
entities.description: Specific traits that contribute to the overall grain and stover yield
